summary: Iteration 86 - UI Lockdown & NumericStepper Verification. All requested features verified: NumericStepper components replace Sliders, On-Demand Settings uses standard sidebar layout (max-w-4xl), Save button is right-aligned (not full-width), 16px side gutters and pb-32 bottom safe zone on mobile, Spot selection has checkbox-style with high-contrast cyan borders, Bookings Manager pricing modal uses 6 NumericSteppers for all pricing inputs. Geographic range logic preserved (Standard: 10-20mi, Pro: 30-50mi).

numeric_stepper_component.details: NumericStepper component renders with increment/decrement buttons (data-testid: stepper-increment, stepper-decrement, stepper-input)

on_demand_settings_numeric_stepper_base_.details: On-Demand Settings uses NumericStepper for base rate (not Slider)

on_demand_settings_numeric_stepper_photo.details: On-Demand Settings uses NumericStepper for photos included (not Slider)

on_demand_settings_save_button_alignment.details: Save button is right-aligned (justify-end), not full-width blue bar. Button width: 158px on 390px mobile viewport

on_demand_settings_bottom_safe_zone.details: Content area has pb-32 for bottom safe zone

on_demand_settings_mobile_gutters.details: px-4 class provides 16px side gutters on mobile

spot_selection_checkbox_style.details: Spot selection uses checkbox-style with border-2 and Check icon inside circle

spot_selection_high_contrast_border.details: Selected spots have border-cyan-500 (high-contrast cyan border)

bookings_manager_numeric_stepper_hourly_.details: Pricing modal uses NumericStepper for hourly rate

bookings_manager_numeric_stepper_resolut.details: Pricing modal uses NumericStepper for Web-Res ($3), Standard ($5), High-Res ($10)

bookings_manager_total_steppers.details: Found 6 NumericStepper components in pricing modal (Hourly Rate, Min Hours, Web-Res, Standard, High-Res, Photos Included)

gps_location_logic_preserved.details: fetchNearbySpots uses navigator.geolocation with role-based radius_miles parameter

no_sliders_found.details: No Slider/Range inputs found - all replaced with NumericStepper

critical_code_review_comments: NumericStepper component well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
On-Demand Settings follows UI standards: max-w-4xl container, right-aligned save button, pb-32 safe zone
Spot selection uses checkbox-style with high-contrast cyan borders (border-cyan-500)
Geographic range logic correctly preserved: getGeographicRadius() returns role-based values
GPS location logic preserved in fetchNearbySpots with proper error handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Lockdown features verified: NumericStepper replaces all Sliders, On-Demand Settings uses standard sidebar layout with right-aligned save button, mobile has 16px gutters and pb-32 safe zone, spot selection has checkbox-style with cyan borders. Geographic range and GPS logic preserved.
